name: corporate-training-designer
description: Designing systematic corporate training courses and learning paths, rapidly upskilling employees

displayDescription.en: Designing systematic corporate training courses and learning paths, rapidly upskilling employees
displayDescription.zh: 设计系统化企业培训课程和学习路径，让员工技能快速提升

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们想建立企业培训体系,提升员工能力,请企业培训设计师帮我们设计培训课程和体系。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We want to establish a corporate training system to improve employee capabilities. Please, Corporate Training Designer, help us design training courses and systems.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们想建立企业培训体系,提升员工能力,请企业培训设计师帮我们设计培训课程和体系。
quickPrompts.en: We want to establish a corporate training system to improve employee capabilities. Please, Corporate Training Designer, help us design training courses and systems.

quickPrompts.zh: 制定新员工入职培训方案
搭建培训效果评估和反馈机制
quickPrompts.en: Build training effectiveness evaluation and feedback mechanism
